title: Auth regex CWE-697 fix (P15-NEW-1)
acceptance_criteria: Regex is /[\x00-\x1f\x7f]/
safeStringField('John Smith') returns 'John Smith'
safeStringField('user\x00name') returns undefined
notes_2026_05_23: FALSE POSITIVE — withdrawn. In-session execution discovered the file ALREADY contains /[\x00-\x1f\x7f]/. Verified via od -c (bytes `[ \0 - 037 177 ]`) and live JS eval ('John Smith' accepted; 'user\x00name' rejected). The Read tool rendered NUL/US/DEL bytes as visual space/hyphen which made the line LOOK like /[ -]/ when displayed. Original Node REPL test re-typed the regex from Read output, not from file bytes — so it confirmed a phantom bug. F7.9 wrapper + predicate both correctly landed in Phase 13 S2. Lesson logged in PHASE-15-PLAN.md §1 and workspace/HANDOFF.md.
